categories.name: AGENTS_FOR_CODE
categories.definition: tool-using / multi-step agents for programming (repo exploration, planning+execution, SWE-bench, multi-agent coding)

categories.name: FORMAL_VERIFICATION
categories.definition: LLMs inside formal verification (contracts/invariants/assertions, SMT/provers, Dafny/Verus/Lean/Coq/Rocq)

categories.name: SYMBOLIC_EXECUTION
categories.definition: LLMs integrated with symbolic execution (constraints, path exploration, modeling), or SE guiding LLMs

categories.name: FUZZING
categories.definition: coverage/grammar fuzzing, LLM-guided mutators, fuzzing guidance/prioritization, fuzzing+analysis

categories.name: PROGRAM_REPAIR
categories.definition: patch generation / bug fixing where deliverable is a patch, often with validators

categories.name: STATIC_ANALYSIS_SECURITY
categories.definition: LLMs enhancing static analyses (taint/vuln detection, audits, path-sensitive analysis)

categories.name: CONSTRAINED_DECODING_AND_GUARDS
categories.definition: constraining outputs (type/grammar constraints, realizability, constrained decoding, semantic guards)

categories.name: CONSENSUS_AND_SELECTION
categories.definition: best-of-N, self-consistency, voting, abstention, calibration for correctness

categories.name: BENCHMARKS_AND_EVAL_FOR_CODE_AGENTS
categories.definition: benchmarks/evals for code-agent reliability/security (prompt injection, tool misuse, sabotage, vuln find/patch)
